issues.sample: OUR SUNROOF GLASS SHATERED FOR NO APPERENT REASON.   APPERENTLY THIS Has happened to many car owners and the car company's push it off on insurance.  But this is a potential huge hazard.
Steering is dangerously unsteady. car reacts to road surface and will pull right or left without warning. Dealer denies a problem. this problem is repeatedly reported to NHTSA.

narrative.headline: What 2017 Infiniti Q70 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Visibility/Wiper (50% of reports).
